info.name: Relativity Space API
info.description: Relativity Space does not publish a public developer API. This Postman collection is intentionally empty and exists only to catalog the provider within API Evangelist. Relativity Space is an aerospace manufacturer (Terran R reusable launch vehicle, Stargate metal 3D printing, dedicated and rideshare payload services); it is distinct from Relativity / RelativityOne (relativity.com), the unrelated legal e-discovery company already tracked separately in the catalog.
